info.english_meaning: to adhere to to be absorbedto get dissolved
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' yO dravIkaraRenAtve lInayet lAyayet layet  lApayellAlayedAtve SlezaRe lIyatelinAt ' (Slo. 17-18) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'avyaktAd vyaktayaH sarvAH praBavantyaharAgame rAtryAgame pralIyante tatrEvAvyaktasaYjYake' (gItA 8.18).. pralIyante=vilIyante tiroBavanti naSyanti
'ekaH prajAyate jantureka eva pralIyate' (manu॰2.240) pralIyate mriyate
'saha meGena taqitpralIyate' (ku॰4.33) tiroDatte ityAha
'asitaM te pralayanam' (aTarva॰1.23.3) pralIyate prakarzeRa lIyate saMSlizyatyatreti pralayanamutpattisTAnam iti sAyaRaH
'tadevApi devA apanyalayanta' (Sa॰brA॰4.1.3.1) nyahnuvatetyAha
'anyo'nyaM samalIyanta palAyanaparAyaRAH' (BA॰22.15) itaretaraM samaSlizyan ityarTaH
'yaTA rAjan hastipade padAni saMlIyante sarvasattvodBavAni' (BA॰SAM॰63.25) saMlIyante=nimajjanti=parikziptAni saMvftAni Bavanti
'saMlInamapi durgezu ninyaturyamasAdanam' (BA॰Adi॰210.20) saMlInam=pracCannam
'sa yaTA dftirnizpIta evaM saMlInaH Sizye' (Sa॰brA॰1.6.3.16) saMlInaH=saNkucitaH
'SravaRe SiroDarAyAM saMlIne' (hari॰2.31.8) ukto'rTaH 'saMlIya tasminnizasAda vfkze' (rA॰5.19.33) saMlIya=saNkocamApadya kisalayasaMlayaH=pallavasaNkocaH
'viSrAntaH saMhatya pakzO saMlayAyEva Driyate' (vf॰u॰4.3.19) saMlayaH=kulAyaH
'avyakte puruze brahmannizkriye sampralIyate' (BA0 SAM0 33931) sampralIyate aBisaMviSati apyeti
'evaM DarmAnrAjaDarmezu sarvAn sarvAvasTaM sampralInAnniboDa' (BA0 SAM0 6325) sampralInAn=antargatAn=nimagnAn
'yaTA sEnDavaKilya udakamevAnuvilIyate' (Sa0 brA0 145412) anuH kramamAha viSca viSezam  dravIBUyodakamevAnupraviSatItyAha
'karRa cApacyutErbARErbaDyamAnAstu somakAH avAlIyanta rAjendra vedanArtA BfSArditAH' (BA0 karRa0 2426).. abAlIyanta=avAnaman BuvamAliNgan
'dozA: srotasvavalIyamAnA GanoBAvamApannAH' (suSruta0 219510) avaruDyamAnA apravahanto'visarpantaH
'lajjayA tvavalIyantI svezu gAtrezu mETilI' (rA0 69943) avalIyantI=avalIyamAnA=saNkucantI=praviSantIva
'vihagAdiBiravalInEH' (bf0 saM0 53114) avalInEH=avatIrREH
'punarvfkzamavalIno manTarakamabravIt' (tantrA0 24) vfkza AlInaH vfkzamASritaH
'AlAnamavalInAnAM vanyAnAmiva dantinAm' (yo0 vA0 6 (2) 9377) avalInAH saMlInA durbalAH kfSAH
'avalInaH sa nirvAkyo hanumAn SiMSapAdrume' (rA0 52414) avalInaSCannaH
'corahatamanyayUTapravizwamavalInaM vA nazwam' (kO0 a0 22912) avalInaM viBrazwaM pracyutam
'tatra ke cinnarA BItA vyalIyanta mahItale' (BA0 sO0 892) mahItale vyalIyanta=BuvamASlizwavantaH
'patatpataNgapratimastaponiDiH puro'sya yAvanna Buvi vyalIyata' (SiSu0 112) Buvi na vyalIyata BuvaM nAvAtarat
'vililye yatkukzisTitaSiKini vAtApivapuzA' (mahAvIra0 660) vAtApikAyena vyadrAvi vAtApitanurdrutatAM gatetyarTaH
'sTAlIpAko vilIyate' (aTarva0 201343) vilIyate dravati
'yasminDarmo virAjeta taM rAjAnaM pracakzate yasminvilIyate DarmastaM devA vfzalaM viduH' (BA0 SAM0 9014).. vilIyate tiroBavati naSyati
'yAtuDAnAn vilApaya' (aTarva0 176) vilApaya nASaya AjyaM vilApayati vilInaM karoti sarvaM cidAtmani vilApayet tiroBAvayet brahmajYAnavilInAnAM na BAti bAhyamarTajAtam vilInA nimagnAH
'tataH SAKAvilInAnAM sa tezAM pakziRAM miTaH' (kaTA0 2628) SAKAsu saMSritAnAmityarTaH
'sarpirvilInamAjyaM syAt' (amara:)
'nayatu mAmAtmano'Ngezu vilayamambA' (uttara0 7) vilayontarBAvaH
'divaso'numitramagamad vilayam' (SiSu0 917) vilayo'vasAnam
'puzwikAma eva…vilayanaM juhuyAt' (go0 gf0 364) vilayanamaDarmaTitaM daDIti satyavrataH sAmaSramI
'vilayanaM maTitaM piRyAkaM maDu mAMsaM ca varjayet' (Apa0 Da0 28181) vilayanaM navanItamalamiti haradattaH
'vidyAkalpena marutA meGAnAM BUyasAmapi brahmaRIva vivartAnAM kvApi vipralayaH kftaH' (uttara0 66).. vipralayaH sampUrRo layaH anavayavenABisaMveSaH
'nirBidyopari karRikArakusumAnyAlIyate zawpadaH' (vikrama0 223) AlIyate'ntaH Sayate
'AlInacandanO stanAviva diSastasyAH SElO malayadardurO' (raGu0 451) AlInacandanO vyAptacandanadrumO
'sAhaM kadambamAlInA meGakAle' (hari0 5424) kadambe nIpe klizwetyAha
'viqAlolUkacaritAmAlInanaravAraRAm' (rA0 21144) AlInAni SlizwAni vilagnAni narARAM vAraRAni kavAwAni yasyAM tAM taTABUtAm
'(kokilA) sTitA cUte mftevAlIya' (kaTA0 11122) AlIya AsaNgaM prApya jawABirAlApayate liyaH saMmAnanaSAlInIkaraRayoSca (1370) iti sUtre vfttAvudAharaRam pUjAM samaDigacCatItyarTaH
'Dvajezu nilIyante vAyasAH' (BA0 vi0 1462) DvajAnASrayante Dvajezu nizIdanti ityarTaH
'nIcErgfDrA nilIyante BAratAnAM camUM prati' (BA0 BIzma0 26) nilIyante avapatanti avataranti

'mAtu rnilIyate kfzRaH' (si0 kO0) antarDatta ityarTaH

'pUrvameva hi jantUnAM yo'DivAso nilIyate' (rAja0 3426) nilIyate niScIyate niyamyate ayamapi kvacidarTakalpanAyAM BAgavatakAramanukaroti kalayA

'puzpEH sarojESca nilInaBfNgEH' (Bawwi0 25) antaHsTitadvirePEH

'nilIyamAnE rvihagE rnimIladBiSca paNkajEH …jYAyate'staM gato raviH' (rA0 42852).. nilIyamAnErnIqezu gacCadBiH
